home.featured_desc: AI-powered applications and full-stack systems I've built from scratch.
home.about_desc: I'm Adarsh Sutar, a 2nd-year B.Tech CSE-AI student at GIET, Bhubaneswar. I build real-world AI solutions — from crop disease detection for farmers to NLP-powered resume analyzers.
home.card1_desc: TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, OpenCV, NLP, Computer Vision
home.card2_desc: Python Flask, FastAPI, React, HTML/CSS/JS, REST APIs
home.cta_desc: Looking for an internship, freelance project, or just want to collaborate? I'd love to hear from you.

about.title: About Me
about.tagline: Building intelligent applications that solve real problems. From AI farming assistants to NLP-powered resume analyzers — I love turning complex ideas into tangible tech.
about.bio_title: Passionate about AI & Building Real Solutions
about.bio_p1: I'm a 2nd-year B.Tech student specializing in Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence at Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocrats (GIET), Bhubaneswar. My journey into tech started with curiosity about how machines can learn — and that curiosity has grown into a passion for building AI-powered systems.
about.bio_p2: I've built projects across multiple domains: AI farming assistants, NLP resume analyzers, ML student performance models, and computer vision gesture recognition systems. Each project has taught me something new.
about.bio_p3: When I'm not coding, I'm reading AI research papers, contributing to open source projects, or exploring new frameworks.
about.value1_desc: Every project I build serves real users with real needs.
about.value2_desc: AI evolves fast. I stay curious and keep building.
